item.dc:creator: Brennan Leach
Kyla Guilfoil
item.description: Senate Republicans met with the acting attorney general to discuss the $1.8 billion fund, which ultimately derailed a vote on a bill to fund ICE and Border Patrol

media:content.media:text: Senate Commerce Subcommittee Holds Hearing On Sports Betting
media:content.media:description: Sen. Ted Cruz called the meeting one of the "roughest" during his tenure in the Senate.

media:content.media:text: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche Meets With Lawmakers On Capitol Hill Over President Trump's 1.8 Billion Compensation Fund
media:content.media:description: Sen. Ted Cruz called the meeting one of the "roughest" during his tenure in the Senate.

item.title: Ted Cruz says GOP senators screamed at Todd Blanche in ‘anti-weaponization’ fund briefing

item.description: Hundreds gathered at the new U.S. consulate in Greenland to protest President Trump’s ambition for greater influence in the Danish territory. In January, the White House said Trump was considering how to acquire Greenland, saying it was strategically vital for security in the Arctic.

media:content.media:title: Greenlanders protest against Trump as the U.S. opens new consulate
media:content.media:description: Hundreds gathered at the new U.S. consulate in Greenland to protest President Trump’s ambition for greater influence in the Danish territory. In January, the White House said Trump was considering how to acquire Greenland, saying it was strategically vital for security in the Arctic.

item.title: Greenlanders protest against Trump as the U.S. opens new consulate

item.description: The Trump administration announced that people with temporary visas seeking to adjust their immigration status to obtain green cards must return to their home countries to “do so through consular processing,” in a major change from current practice. NBC News' Jonathan Allen explains the impact and how the new requirement will be enforced.

media:content.media:title: DHS to require green card applicants to return to home countries to apply
media:content.media:description: The Trump administration announced that people with temporary visas seeking to adjust their immigration status to obtain green cards must return to their home countries to “do so through consular processing,” in a major change from current practice. NBC News' Jonathan Allen explains the impact and how the new requirement will be enforced.

item.title: DHS to require green card applicants to return to home countries to apply

item.dc:creator: Alicia Victoria Lozano
Dennis Romero
item.description: SAN DIEGO — As an elementary school student at the Islamic Center of San Diego in the early aughts, Sarah Youssef said she doesn’t remember there being guards on patrol or gates keeping out danger

media:content.media:text: At Least 3 Killed In Shooting At Islamic Center of San Diego
media:content.media:description: Mosque members embrace in the parking lot of the Islamic Center of San Diego on Tuesday. Three people were killed and two suspects are dead after a shooting at San Diego's largest mosque.

media:content.media:text: US-RELIGION-CRIME
media:content.media:description: Mosque members embrace in the parking lot of the Islamic Center of San Diego on Tuesday. Three people were killed and two suspects are dead after a shooting at San Diego's largest mosque.

media:content.media:text: Several children, with adults in the background, at a candlelight vigil at dusk.
media:content.media:description: Mosque members embrace in the parking lot of the Islamic Center of San Diego on Tuesday. Three people were killed and two suspects are dead after a shooting at San Diego's largest mosque.

media:content.media:text: US-SHOOTING-CRIME-ISLAMIC CENTER
media:content.media:description: Mosque members embrace in the parking lot of the Islamic Center of San Diego on Tuesday. Three people were killed and two suspects are dead after a shooting at San Diego's largest mosque.

item.title: The deepest fears of San Diego’s religious communities were realized in Islamic Center shooting

item.dc:creator: Anthony Cusumano
Casey Wooten
item.description: Donald Trump Jr., the president’s oldest son, married socialite Bettina Anderson on Thursday in West Palm Beach, Florida, according to Palm Beach County records

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump Jr., and Bettina Anderson
media:content.media:description: Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson announced their engagement at a White House holiday party in December 2025.

item.title: Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson get married in Florida

Joe Murphy
item.description: The Premier League has a new champion, a late-night host signs off, and the U.S. indicts Raúl Castro.

item.title: A mysterious document’s long-awaited release, and pour one out for a legendary beer: The news quiz

The Associated Press

item.title: India’s ‘Cockroach Janata Party’ began as a joke. Then millions joined in.

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: Shop the best Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, EltaMD and Apple.

media:content.media:credit: Amazon; Kara Birnbaum / NBC News; Brooklinen
media:content.media:text: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.
media:content.media:description: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.

media:content.media:text: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.
media:content.media:description: It may not be Black Friday, but Memorial Day weekend is one of the best times to shop before summer hits.

item.title: The 93+ absolute best Memorial Day sales worth shopping

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: The estranged husband of a prominent New York City art dealer was convicted Friday of hiring a hitman to kill him in Brazil

media:content.media:text: Brent Sikkema.
media:content.media:description: Brent Sikkema on Sept. 11, 2007 in New York City.

item.title: Estranged husband convicted of murder-for-hire in killing of art dealer

item.dc:creator: Reuters
item.description: The death toll from a drone strike on a student dorm in the Russian-controlled Luhansk region of eastern Ukraine has risen to 16, with most of the victims young women, Russian officials said on Saturday, after a heated ⁠U.N.

media:content.media:text: Aftermath of drone attack on Luhansk college amid Russia-Ukraine conflict.
media:content.media:description: A destroyed building of the Starobilsk College of Luhansk Pedagogical University following a recent attack in the Luhansk region, a Russian-controlled area of Ukraine, on Saturday.

item.title: Russia blames Ukraine, vows retaliation as 16 killed in strike on student dorm

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
item.description: President Donald Trump’s envoy to Greenland says he got a warm welcome on his first visit this week.

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-GREENLAND-DENMARK-US-POLITICS-DEMO
media:content.media:description: TOPSHOT - Protestors with flags of Greenland take part in a demonstration against the new American consulate's inauguration in Nuuk, Greenland,on May 21, 2026.

media:content.media:text: U.S. special envoy to Greenland, Louisiana Gov. Jeff Landry
media:content.media:description: U.S. special envoy to Greenland, Louisiana Gov. Jeff Landry, in Nuuk on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: GREENLAND-DENMARK-POLITICS
media:content.media:description: Protestors with placards which read USA and ASU (Stop It in Greenlandic) demonstrate against the new American consulate in Nuuk, on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: GREENLAND-DENMARK-POLITICS
media:content.media:description: Protestors hold the Greenlandic flag as the demonstrate against the new American consulate in Nuuk on Thursday.

item.title: Trump’s envoy went to Greenland to make ‘friends.’ They were left unimpressed.

Kyla Guilfoil
item.description: The Justice Department has removed press releases detailing the charges against hundreds of individuals who participated in the Jan.

media:content.media:text: Trump supporters storm Capitol building in Washington
media:content.media:description: A review by NBC News found the vast majority of news releases pertaining to Jan. 6 defendants have been removed from the DOJ website.

item.title: Justice Department deletes press releases on charges against Jan. 6 rioters

item.description: An elderly California couple found dead in a suspected murder-suicide had recently been scammed by someone posing as actor Tom Selleck, a longtime friend said

media:content.media:text: Donald Whitaker, 80, and his wife Karen Whitaker,
media:content.media:description: Donald and Karen Whitaker.

item.title: Woman dead in murder-suicide may have been victim of a celebrity fraud scheme

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
item.description: Authorities are working to prevent a potential hazmat explosion in Southern California, where an estimated 40,000 people were under evacuation orders

media:content.media:text: Southern California Chemical Tank
media:content.media:description: Water is sprayed on a tank that overheated at an aerospace plant in Garden Grove, Calif., Friday, May 22, 2026.

item.title: 40,000 Southern Californians ordered to evacuate amid threat of chemical explosion

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
item.description: Rapper Rob Base died Friday at age 59 after a cancer diagnosis, according to a post on his social media.

media:content.media:text: Rob Base lying down on a white seamless backdrop.
media:content.media:description: Rapper Rob Base, aka Robert Ginyard, in New York in 1989.

item.title: ‘It Takes Two’ rapper Rob Base dies at 59

item.description: Thousands of people in Southern California are under evacuation orders over fears that a tank containing toxic chemicals may explode. Authorities in Orange County said they’re unable to control the valves on a tank at an aerospace manufacturing facility in Garden Grove.

media:content.media:title: Thousands under evacuation orders in Southern California amid threat of chemical explosion
media:content.media:description: Thousands of people in Southern California are under evacuation orders over fears that a tank containing toxic chemicals may explode. Authorities in Orange County said they’re unable to control the valves on a tank at an aerospace manufacturing facility in Garden Grove.

item.title: Thousands under evacuation orders in Southern California amid threat of chemical explosion

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
item.description: An elderly California couple found dead in a suspected murder-suicide had recently been scammed by someone posing as actor Tom Selleck, a longtime friend said

media:content.media:description: Donald and Karen Whitaker.

item.title: Woman dead in murder-suicide may have been victim of a celebrity fraud scheme

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
item.description: A federal judge in Tennessee dismissed the criminal charges against Kilmar Abrego Garcia on Friday, finding that the investigation into his alleged involvement with human trafficking was “tainted.”

media:content.media:text: Kilmar Abrego Garcia arrives with his wife, Jennifer Vasquez Sura, at U.S. District Court for the District of Maryland on Dec. 22, 2025.
media:content.media:description: Kilmar Abrego Garcia returned to the U.S. in June 2025 after being deported to El Salvador.

item.title: Judge dismisses charges against Kilmar Abrego Garcia in human trafficking case

item.title: Estranged husband convicted of murder-for-hire in killing of art dealer
